name: [TC-2001] Dashboard Final State — All 4 KPI Cards
steps:
1. Go to / (Dashboard)
2. Check each KPI card:
   - Cash & Bank: PKR 148,600.00 (A1 76,400 + A2 45,000 + A3 27,200)
   - Total Receivables: PKR 0.00
   - Total Payables: PKR 4,500.00 (S2 remaining)
   - Inventory Value: PKR 40,200.00
3. Check per-account breakdown in Cash card: A1 76,400, A2 45,000, A3 27,200
4. Check payables breakdown: only S2 shown (S1 is at 0 or credit)
5. Check recent transactions list: TX-ADJ3 (2026-03-29) should be most recent
6. Check quick action buttons navigate correctly
expected_result:
- Cash: PKR 148,600 | Receivables: PKR 0 | Payables: PKR 4,500 | Inventory: PKR 40,200
- Account breakdown sums to PKR 148,600
- Recent transactions visible and clickable
notes: If any KPI is wrong, cross-reference with ledger statements to find which transaction caused the discrepancy

name: [TC-2101] Supplier S1 Full Ledger Verification
steps:
1. /supplier/detail/[S1_ID] → Ledger tab, range 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-29
2. Expected 5 entries in order:
   #1: 2026-03-01, PURCHASE TX-P1, +PKR 21,000, running 21,000
   #2: 2026-03-05, PURCHASE TX-P2, +PKR 30,000, running 51,000
   #3: 2026-03-15, PAYMENT TX-SP1, -PKR 21,000, running 30,000
   #4: 2026-03-17, PAYMENT TX-SP2, -PKR 30,000, running 0
   #5: 2026-03-22, RETURN TX-SR2, -PKR 2,200, running -2,200
3. Verify final running balance = -PKR 2,200
4. Verify final balance matches Current Balance card on same page
expected_result:
- Exactly 5 entries
- Final balance: -PKR 2,200
- Running balance correct at each row
- Balance card matches ledger final balance
notes: Running balance discrepancy = accounting logic bug

name: [TC-2102] Supplier S2 Full Ledger Verification
steps:
1. /supplier/detail/[S2_ID] → Ledger tab
2. Expected 3 entries:
   #1: 2026-03-07, PURCHASE TX-P3, +PKR 10,000, running 10,000
   #2: 2026-03-18, PAYMENT TX-SP3, -PKR 5,000, running 5,000
   #3: 2026-03-21, RETURN TX-SR1, -PKR 500, running 4,500
3. Final balance = PKR 4,500
4. Matches balance card

name: [TC-2103] Customer C1 Full Ledger Verification
steps:
1. /customer/detail/[C1_ID] → Ledger tab
2. Expected 5 entries:
   #1: 2026-03-10, SALE TX-S1, +PKR 22,400, running 22,400
   #2: 2026-03-12, SALE TX-S2, +PKR 10,000, running 32,400
   #3: 2026-03-16, PAYMENT TX-CP1, -PKR 22,400, running 10,000
   #4: 2026-03-19, PAYMENT TX-CP2, -PKR 10,000, running 0
   #5: 2026-03-23, RETURN TX-CR1, -PKR 6,000, running -6,000
3. Final balance = -PKR 6,000
4. Matches balance card

name: [TC-2104] Customer C2 Full Ledger Verification
steps:
1. /customer/detail/[C2_ID] → Ledger tab
2. Expected 3 entries:
   #1: 2026-03-13, SALE TX-S3, +PKR 2,200, running 2,200
   #2: 2026-03-20, PAYMENT TX-CP3, -PKR 2,200, running 0
   #3: 2026-03-24, RETURN TX-CR2, -PKR 500, running -500
3. Final balance = -PKR 500
4. Matches balance card

name: [TC-2105] Ledger Date Range Filtering
steps:
1. S1 Ledger, range 2026-03-15 to 2026-03-17:
   Only TX-SP1 (Mar 15) and TX-SP2 (Mar 17) should appear
2. S1 Ledger, single day 2026-03-05:
   Only TX-P2 should appear
3. S1 Ledger, range 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-28:
   No entries — empty state shown
expected_result:
- Date filter correctly restricts entries
- Running balance still shown for filtered range
- Empty state shown without errors

name: [TC-2106] Payment Account A1 Full Statement
steps:
1. /payment-accounts/detail/[A1_ID] → Statement tab, range 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-29
2. Expected entries:
   Opening: PKR 100,000
   2026-03-15: SUPPLIER_PAYMENT out 21,000 → balance 79,000
   2026-03-16: CUSTOMER_PAYMENT in 22,400 → balance 101,400
   2026-03-25: INTERNAL_TRANSFER out 25,000 → balance 76,400
3. Final balance = PKR 76,400
4. Matches Current Balance card
expected_result:
- 3 transaction entries + opening balance
- Final: PKR 76,400
- In/out columns correctly assigned

name: [TC-2201] Transaction List — Type and Status Filters
steps:
Filter /transactions by each type and verify:
- PURCHASE → TX-P1, TX-P2, TX-P3 only
- SALE → TX-S1, TX-S2, TX-S3 only
- SUPPLIER_PAYMENT → TX-SP1, TX-SP2, TX-SP3 only
- CUSTOMER_PAYMENT → TX-CP1, TX-CP2, TX-CP3 only
- SUPPLIER_RETURN → TX-SR1, TX-SR2 only
- CUSTOMER_RETURN → TX-CR1, TX-CR2 only
- INTERNAL_TRANSFER → TX-IT1, TX-IT2 only
- ADJUSTMENT → TX-ADJ1, TX-ADJ2, TX-ADJ3 only
Also: filter by date range 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-10 → only first 4 transactions visible
expected_result:
- Each type filter shows exactly those transactions
- No cross-contamination
- Date range filter works correctly

name: [TC-2301] Inactive Entity Behavior
steps:
1. Deactivate S2 (has PKR 4,500 balance)
   - Verify balance preserved, ledger still visible
   - Try creating a new purchase: can INACTIVE S2 be selected? Note behavior.
2. Deactivate P1-V1 (has 22 units stock)
   - Verify stock preserved
   - Try creating a new sale: can INACTIVE P1-V1 be selected? Note behavior.
3. Deactivate A3 (has PKR 27,200)
   - Check if dashboard total changes or stays same
   - Try creating a payment: can INACTIVE A3 be selected? Note behavior.
4. REACTIVATE all 3 after testing
expected_result:
- Data preserved on deactivation
- Inactive entities should ideally be blocked/hidden in transaction forms
- Dashboard behavior with inactive accounts: note whether total changes
- End state: S2, P1-V1, A3 all ACTIVE
notes: Must reactivate all before ending testing session

name: [TC-2401] Transaction Lifecycle Protections
steps:
1. Open any POSTED transaction (e.g. TX-P1)
   - Verify Post button absent/disabled
   - Verify Edit button absent/disabled or form is read-only
   - Verify Delete button absent/disabled
2. Attempt each action if buttons exist — confirm error is shown
3. Check TX list pagination:
   - Navigate to page 2 (if exists)
   - Apply a type filter — pagination should reset or remain consistent
   - 'Showing X of Y records' should update with filter
expected_result:
- Posted transactions: cannot post/edit/delete
- Pagination + filters work together correctly
- If edit/delete on posted TX is possible: CRITICAL BUG

name: [TC-2501] Form Validation Edge Cases
steps:
On purchase form:
1. Set date to 2027-01-01 (future) — note if allowed or blocked
2. Set date to 2000-01-01 (historical) — note if allowed
3. Add a line item with Qty = 0 — should be blocked
4. Add a line with Unit Price = -100 — should be blocked
5. Add discount = 9999 on a line total of 1000 — should be capped or blocked
6. Try saving with zero line items — should be blocked
expected_result:
- Future dates: allowed (note behavior)
- Historical dates: allowed (note behavior)
- Zero qty: validation error
- Negative price: blocked
- Discount > total: blocked or capped
- Empty lines: blocked on save

name: [TC-2601] Authentication — Token Refresh and Logout
steps:
Test A — Expired access token:
1. Open browser DevTools → Application → localStorage
2. Delete accessToken (keep refreshToken)
3. Navigate to /supplier or trigger any API call
4. Expected: silent token refresh, user stays logged in

Test B — Both tokens expired:
1. Clear both accessToken and refreshToken from localStorage
2. Navigate to /transactions
3. Expected: redirect to /signin

Test C — Direct URL without login:
1. Fresh incognito window → go to /supplier
2. Expected: redirect to /signin

Test D — Logout:
1. Use logout button
2. Check localStorage: all 3 keys cleared (accessToken, refreshToken, user)
3. Press browser back → should redirect to /signin again
expected_result:
- Expired access: silent refresh, no logout
- Expired both: redirect to signin
- No auth: redirect to signin
- Logout: clears storage, back button blocked

name: [TC-2701] UI Consistency — Currency, Badges, Loading, Empty States
steps:
1. Currency: check 10 random places — all must show 'PKR X,XXX.00'
2. Status badges:
   - ACTIVE: green on supplier, customer, product, payment account lists
   - DRAFT: gray on transaction list
   - POSTED: green on transaction list
3. Loading states: hard-refresh each list page — skeleton rows visible before data
4. Empty states: filter transaction list to VOIDED (none exist) — empty message shown
5. Sidebar: navigate to each module — active item highlighted, only one at a time
6. Open any drawer (Add Supplier): try scrolling the page behind it — should be locked
7. Close drawer: scroll works again
expected_result:
- PKR format consistent everywhere
- Badge colors consistent across all modules
- Skeleton loading on all list pages
- Empty states show message, not blank screen
- Body scroll locked when drawer open

name: [TC-2801] Final Balance Sweep — All Entities
steps:
Navigate to each page and record the displayed balance. Compare to expected:

/supplier/detail/[S1_ID] → Balance: -PKR 2,200
/supplier/detail/[S2_ID] → Balance: PKR 4,500
/customer/detail/[C1_ID] → Balance: -PKR 6,000
/customer/detail/[C2_ID] → Balance: -PKR 500
/products/detail/[P1_ID] → P1-V1 stock: 22, P1-V2 stock: 0
/products/detail/[P2_ID] → P2-V1 stock: 72, P2-V2 stock: 45
/payment-accounts/detail/[A1_ID] → Balance: PKR 76,400
/payment-accounts/detail/[A2_ID] → Balance: PKR 45,000
/payment-accounts/detail/[A3_ID] → Balance: PKR 27,200
/ Dashboard → Cash: 148,600 | Receivables: 0 | Payables: 4,500 | Inventory: 40,200
/reports/inventory-valuation (2026-03-29) → Total: PKR 40,200
/reports/aged-payables (2026-03-29) → Total: PKR 4,500
/reports/aged-receivables (2026-03-29) → Total: PKR 0

For any mismatch: open a Bug Report with the page, expected, actual, and phase reference
expected_result: All values match the expected column exactly. Any deviation = bug.
notes: This is the final gate check. Only mark PASSED if every single value matches.
